---
name: 🌐 New jurisdiction/language pack
about: Propose or submit a new legal keyword pack for a language or jurisdiction
title: '[Pack] '
labels: 'language-pack, enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Language / Jurisdiction

**Language code (ISO 639-1):** <!-- e.g., it, nl, pl, tr, zh, ja, ko, hi -->

**Jurisdictional scope:**
- [ ] Country-wide (one primary country)
- [ ] Multi-country (regional, e.g., LatAm Spanish)
- [ ] Sub-jurisdiction (e.g., `en-us`, `es-mx`, `fr-ca`)

**Primary countries covered:**

## Legal system type

- [ ] Common law
- [ ] Civil law
- [ ] Mixed / hybrid
- [ ] Religious law (sharia / halakha / canon)
- [ ] Customary

## Are you a legal professional?

- [ ] Yes — jurisdiction:
- [ ] No, but I'm a translator / legal technologist / researcher
- [ ] No, general contributor

## Scope of the pack

Planning to include (check all that apply):

- [ ] Dates & time expressions
- [ ] Money & currency (country-specific)
- [ ] Parties & roles
- [ ] Legal procedures
- [ ] Courts & tribunals
- [ ] Document types
- [ ] Criminal law
- [ ] Family law
- [ ] Property / real estate
- [ ] Labor / employment
- [ ] Insurance / torts
- [ ] Contracts / commercial
- [ ] Privacy-sensitive patterns (national ID formats, etc.)
- [ ] File-name signals

## Reference sources

<!--
List the sources for legal terminology you plan to use:
- Official statutes
- Bar association glossaries
- Legal dictionaries
- Personal practice experience
-->

## Status

- [ ] Just proposing — would love someone else to build this
- [ ] I'd like to build this myself — please assign to me
- [ ] PR already open: #

## Template to start from

Use [`common-en.md`](../../skills/mapping-legal-cases/references/keywords/common-en.md) as your structural template.
Existing packs for reference:
- Hebrew: [`he.md`](../../skills/mapping-legal-cases/references/keywords/he.md)
- Arabic: [`ar.md`](../../skills/mapping-legal-cases/references/keywords/ar.md)
- Russian: [`ru.md`](../../skills/mapping-legal-cases/references/keywords/ru.md)
- Spanish: [`es.md`](../../skills/mapping-legal-cases/references/keywords/es.md)
- French: [`fr.md`](../../skills/mapping-legal-cases/references/keywords/fr.md)
- German: [`de.md`](../../skills/mapping-legal-cases/references/keywords/de.md)
- Portuguese: [`pt.md`](../../skills/mapping-legal-cases/references/keywords/pt.md)
